impact: WebhookProcessingRepository.claim does not expose processingLeaseSeconds although claimWebhookEvent supports it.
resolution: Exposed processingLeaseSeconds on WebhookProcessingRepository.claim and processVerifiedWebhook, then passed the value through to claim adapters so callers can configure processing lease duration without bypassing the repository abstraction. Added a regulated invariant test covering queue delivery claim inputs with a custom lease.
title: [clean-code] WebhookProcessingRepository.claim does not expose processingLeaseSeconds althoug
